results.title: Gaslighting NY Times Defends Slow CA Vote Count as ‘Meticulous’
results.description: The far-left New York Times says that President Trump’s accusation that California is guilty of vote fraud might undermine public “confidence in [the] November result.” Oddly, though, the Times writes that as though it’s a bad thing. Here’s the setup: “There’s BIG cheating by the Dumocrats in California,” Mr. Trump wrote at 1:05 a.m. on [...] The post Gaslighting NY Times Defends Slow CA Vote Count as ‘Meticulous’ appeared first on CBNC .

results.title: RBI Plans Polymer Notes: Waterproof Currency May Soon Replace Paper Notes
results.description: #ଓଦ ା_ହେଲେ_ନଷ୍ଟ_ହେବନି, #କ ି_ପୁରୁଣା_ବି_ହେବନି ଦେଶରେ ଖୁବଶୀଘ୍ର ଆସିବ ପଲିମର ବା ପ୍ଲାଷ୍ଟିକ୍ ନୋଟ। କାଗଜ ନୋଟ୍ ବଦଳରେ ପ୍ଲାଷ୍ଟିକ୍ ନୋଟ୍ ଆଣିବାକୁ RBIର ଯୋଜନା। ଏନେଇ ପ୍ରସ୍ତାବ ପ୍ରାଥମିକ ପର୍ଯ୍ୟାୟରେ ଥିବା କହିଛନ୍ତି RBI ଗଭର୍ଣ୍ଣର। କାଗଜ ନୋଟ୍ ମୁଦ୍ରଣରେ ଅଧିକ ଖର୍ଚ୍ଚ ହେଉଥିବାରୁ RBI ଏଭଳି ନିଷ୍ପତ୍ତି ନେଇଛି। ପ୍ଲାଷ୍ଟିକ ନୋଟ୍ ୱାଟରପ୍ରୁଫ୍ ରହିବା ଫଳରେ କାଗଜ ନୋଟ୍ ତୁଳନାରେ ଅଧିକ ଦିନ ତିଷ୍ଠିବ ବୋଲି କୁହାଯାଉଛି India may soon see the introduction of polymer, or plastic, currency notes as the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) considers replacing traditional paper notes. According to the report, the proposal is currently at a preliminary stage, and the RBI Governor has indicated that the plan is under consideration. The move is aimed at reducing the high cost associated with printing paper currency. #EconomyNews_RBI #PolymerNotes #PlasticCurrency #RBIGovernor #CurrencyReform #IndianEconomy #WaterproofNotes #BankingNews #PolymerNotes_India #PlasticCurrency_RBI #CurrencyChange_India #OdishaTV #OTV For latest news updates follow us on WhatsApp: https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029VaYNIW78qIzrtKKZiD3M OdishaTV is Odisha's no 1 News Channel. results.title: Odisha Marks World Environment Day; Minister Awards 412 ‘Prakruti Mitra’
results.description: The state-wide World Environment Day 2026 was observed on Wednesday at the Convention Center at Lok Seva Bhawan under the theme “Prakruti Ru Prerana – Jalabayu Pain, Ama Bhabisyat Pain” (Inspired by Nature – For Climate, For Our Future). The Department of Forest, Environment, and Climate Change, Government of Odisha, arranged the event. Forest, Environment, [...] The post Odisha Marks World Environment Day; Minister Awards 412 ‘Prakruti Mitra’ appeared first on shree1news .
